学校・会議・授業でのファイル共有具体例: Concrete File Sharing Examples in Schools, Meetings, and Classes
学校の授業やビジネス会議、ゼミなどでFS!QRを効果的に活用する具体例を紹介。Q: Introducing concrete examples of how to effectively use FS!QR in school classes, business meetings, and seminars. We will explain paperless file sharing using QR codes and collaborative notes.
学校, 会議, 授業, 具体例, ファイル共有, 共同編集, ペーパーレス, 授: school, meeting, class, concrete examples, file sharing, collaborative editing, paperless, class support, QR code
大学のゼミや、企業のワークショップなどのグループ学習では、少人数で意見を交わしな: In group learning environments like university seminars or corporate workshops, there are many opportunities to work together in small groups, exchanging ideas to create presentation materials or reports. FS!QR serves as a powerful tool in these situations as well.
小テストの答案用紙や、社外秘のプロジェクト資料などを配布する際は、パスワード保護: When distributing quiz answer sheets or confidential project materials, please enable the password protection function. This ensures that even if someone other than the intended recipients takes a photo of or scans the QR code, access by third parties who do not know the password will be strictly blocked.
ビジネスの会議室においても、FS!QRは資料のペーパーレス配布とコミュニケーショ: In business meeting rooms, FS!QR contributes significantly to paperless document distribution and active communication. By simply projecting a QR code onto a screen or a large monitor, all participants can access the meeting materials on their own PCs or tablets. This eliminates the hassle of entering everyone's email address to send files, and avoids the noise of posting files to internal chat channels which triggers notifications for uninvolved members.
試験対策や授業後の自動データ消去: Automatic Data Deletion After Exam Prep or Classes
小中学校における「GIGAスクール構想」の進展や、大学・専門学校でのノートPC・: With the progress of the "GIGA School Concept" in elementary and junior high schools, and the requirement of laptops and tablets in universities and vocational schools, the utilization of digital devices in educational settings has become indispensable. However, distributing large volumes of textbook PDFs, quizzes, and reference data to students in each class remains a cumbersome task for educators.
「授業中の1時間だけ参照させたい」「試験前の勉強用として3日間だけ公開したい」と: If you want students to reference files "only for one hour during class" or want to publish them "only for three days for study before an exam", set a short retention period. Since data is automatically and irreversibly deleted from the server after the period ends, it completely prevents the risk of past teaching materials or exam papers leaking permanently onto the internet.
FS!QRを使えば、教員が教室の黒板やスクリーンに生成したQRコードを投影するだ: By using FS!QR, teachers simply project the generated QR code onto the classroom blackboard or screen, and students scan it using the camera on their own tablets or smartphones (Chromebook, iPad, Windows, Mac, etc.) to download digital worksheets, audio, or video teaching materials in an instant. This reduces the "time spent distributing materials" at the beginning of class to almost zero, setting up an environment where students can focus entirely on the lesson itself.

学校で導入されている一般的な学習管理システム（LMS）を経由する場合、「ログイン: When distributing via typical Learning Management Systems (LMS) adopted in schools, class time is often cut short by troubles such as "some students cannot log in", "registrations to specific class groups are incomplete", or "external part-time lecturers and guest speakers do not have login permissions".

例えば、フィールドワークでスマートフォンを使って撮影した現場の写真や、実験データ: For example, if you want to send on-site photos taken with a smartphone during fieldwork or CSV files containing experiment data to a presentation PC held by a group representative, there is no need to pass around USB drives or connect via messaging apps. Simply scan the QR code displayed on the smartphone screen with the PC's camera, or enter a short passkey, and the data transfer is completed instantly. This prevents work interruptions caused by equipment trouble or preparation delays, supporting project creation within limited time.
さらに、FS!QRの「Note（共同編集ノート）」機能を組み合わせることで、会議: Furthermore, by combining FS!QR's "Note (Collaborative Note)" function, meeting productivity is dramatically improved. Since everyone can write to the same shared note simultaneously from their browsers, the following use cases are possible.
アイデア出しのディスカッションにおいて、各自のPCから付箋のようにテキストを書き: In idea-generation discussions, everyone writes text from their own PC like sticky notes, visualising the ideas together in real time.
司会進行や書記だけでなく、参加者全員がその場で決定事項や補足情報を同時入力し、会: Not just the chair and the note-taker — every participant types decisions and supporting details simultaneously, so the minutes are complete the moment the meeting ends.
社外のクライアントや外部コンサルタントなど、社内セキュリティの制限でGoogle: Even with external clients or consultants who can't be granted co-editing rights in Google Docs or Microsoft Teams under your company's security rules, you can co-edit a note safely and instantly with no account sign-up.
